name: Romy's Kahuku Prawns
tagline: Farm-raised shrimp from their own ponds — the butter garlic are plumper than Giovanni's, fight me.
mustOrder: steamed garlic prawns (steaming preserves the sweetness better than frying)
parking: Dirt lot next to the shrimp ponds
talkStory: Filipino-owned family operation raising prawns in their own aquaculture ponds since the early 2000s — one of the few Kahuku shrimp spots where the shrimp literally come from right there on site.
insiderTips: This is the spot locals recommend when they say 'skip Giovanni's.' Be patient — small family operation, not a fast-food line. Don't wander into the ponds.
